title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Momonosuke, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I feel like I'm having a blast...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, you two! He's still breathing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You've gotta be okay, right?! Big bro....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We sacrificed one of our best agents and enraged Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THE HALL OF POWER, PANGAEA CASTLE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are we sure our priorities are straight?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this may be better than the alternative. It's imperative...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: that we snuff out something this problematic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter the era, the world government has always failed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Its user's body gains the properties of rubber. In combat,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're supposedly only limited by their imagination, putting smiles on faces...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: far and wide. They are the embodiment of "the warrior of liberation,"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's almost as if the fruit itself is evading us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All zoan fruits have a will of their own...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and this one carries the name of a "God."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Awakening exponentially strengthens their rubbery body and they have even more freedom.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
